settings.heading: Retirement Memento Design Ideas
settings.subheading: Heartfelt retirement memento designs — engraved wood, crystal keepsakes, photo mementos and service-years pieces that honour a long career. Custom-made by Meru Trophy.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meaningful retirement memento designs are personal: engraved wooden plaques, crystal keepsakes, photo mementos and service-years pieces carrying the name, years of service and a warm citation. Meru Trophy designs and delivers these from ₹350. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: Ideas that work
settings.text: A retirement memento should feel personal and dignified. Lead with the retiree's name, years of service and a warm citation, and choose a material that feels right — wood for warmth, crystal for ceremony. A photo of a defining moment makes it unforgettable. (See our retirement mementos.)

settings.heading: Popular designs
settings.text:
• Engraved wooden plaque — warm, classic, with full citation.
  • Crystal keepsake — premium and ceremonial.
  • Photo memento — a defining moment, printed and engraved.
  • Service-years piece — "32 years of service" front and centre.
  • Desk keepsake — compact memento for home or office.
  • Group-signed plaque — space for team names/messages.

settings.question: What should a retirement memento say?
settings.answer: Name, designation, years of service, dates, organisation/logo, and a short line of gratitude.

settings.question: Wood or crystal for retirement?
settings.answer: Wood feels warm and personal; crystal feels ceremonial. Both engrave beautifully.

settings.question: Can you add a photo?
settings.answer: Yes — UV-printed photos with an engraved message make a deeply personal keepsake.

settings.question: Can you make several for a group?

settings.heading: Honouring a retirement?
settings.text: Tell us what you're planning — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
